title: Anthropic and OpenAI are both launching joint ventures for enterprise AI services | TechCrunch
description: Both Anthropic and OpenAI have partnered with asset managers to more aggressively market their enterprise AI products.

title: Anthropic tests Jupiter-v1-p before potential launch in May
description: Anthropic begins red teaming for Claude Jupiter V1 P ahead of its May 6th Code with Claude conference, pointing at a potential model launch.

title: Stop Data Leaks in Claude Code - by Josh Devon
description: Prevent agent data exfiltration by moving from system prompts to hard rules. Learn how to secure Claude Code using an agent harness and Cedar policy as code.

title: Pixar’s new Bug’s Life poster just hit me right in the feels | Creative Bloq
description: Fans are loving the adorable illustration.

title: AI has a sprawling data problem. Airbyte has just launched a tool to fix it. - The New Stack
description: Airbyte has launched Airbyte Agents, a new service with a Context Store that pre-indexes business data so AI agents can query it without live API calls.

title: The data on Jira vs Linear: Who’s winning new customers?

title: Welcome to Just
description: Want to be a creator? Join Just: a new way to earn real money for great content, for creators of any size.
